assistant.title: Style assistant
assistant.subtitle: Ask me about your look
assistant.greeting: Hi 🌷 I'm your style assistant. Tell me the occasion or style you're after, and I'll pick the best pieces from this store for you.
assistant.placeholder: e.g. an outfit for a summer wedding…
assistant.photoQuery: Find pieces similar to this photo
assistant.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

loyalty.banner: Congrats! 🎁 You reached the loyal-customer reward — {{percent}}% off applied automatically to this order

referral.welcomeFrom: {{name}} invited you! Your {{percent}}% welcome discount is applied 🌷
referral.shareDesc: Share your personal link with friends — each friend who orders through it gets {{percent}}% off, and your referral count grows.
referral.shareMsg: Shop at {{store}} and get a special discount 🌷 My link: {{link}}
referral.disabled: This store hasn't enabled the referral program yet.

offers.title: Offers & deals
offers.subtitle: All discounted pieces in one place ✨
offers.empty: No offers right now. Check back soon!

reels.title: Reels
reels.empty: No videos yet — check back soon!

common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete?

searchPage.title: Search
searchPage.placeholder: Search for a dress, abaya, store…
searchPage.noResults: No results for “{{q}}” — try another word

filters.title: Filters
filters.none: No products match your filters — try loosening them

offline.message: No internet connection — only the home page is available

pwa.title: Get the Bazara app
pwa.desc: Shop faster — an icon on your home screen that opens full-screen.
pwa.iosTitle: Add Bazara to your Home Screen
pwa.iosStep0: Tap the address bar at the bottom to reveal Safari's toolbar (if hidden)
pwa.iosStep2: Scroll and choose “Add to Home Screen”, then “Add”
pwa.iosHint: Note: this install button can't run automatically on iPhone — Apple only allows installing from Safari's Share button (steps above). On Android it installs with one tap.
pwa.desktopHelp: To install on desktop: click the install icon (⬇️ or a small screen) in the address bar, or open the browser menu (⋮) and choose “Install Bazara”.
pwa.iosReassure: After these 2 steps, Bazara becomes an app on your home screen that opens full-screen — the same experience as the store app. 🎉
pwa.iosOpenSafari: Looks like you opened the link inside an app (e.g. WhatsApp). Open it in Safari first: tap ⋯ or the Share button, then choose “Open in Safari” — then repeat the 2 steps. (Add to Home Screen works only in Safari)

image.chooseFile: Choose an image from your device

video.chooseFile: Choose a video from your device
video.notVideo: The selected file is not a video.

home.heroDesc: Create your store, add products, and share your link with customers. Luxury design, strong security, fast Google indexing.
home.s2Desc: Create your store, upload products, and start selling instantly via WhatsApp & Instagram.
home.s3Desc: Built-in SEO so your customers find your store easily.
home.promoTitle: Delivery across Palestine · Cash on delivery
home.feature1Desc: Hashed passwords, secure sessions, and attack protection.
home.feature2Desc: Modern responsive UI with elegant gold accents.
home.feature3Desc: Sitemap, meta tags, and IndexNow for fast indexing.

auth.loginSubtitle: Welcome back — sign in to manage your store
auth.registerSubtitle: Create your account and launch your store in minutes
auth.name: Name
auth.codeSentHint: We sent a 6-digit code to your email (check Spam). Enter it with your new password.
auth.passwordHint: At least 8 characters with a letter, number, and symbol.
auth.forgotDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to set a new password.
auth.resetSent: If the email is registered, we sent you a reset link. Check your inbox (and Spam).
auth.resetDone: Password set successfully! Log in now.
auth.registeredDesc: Log in now to access your store and dashboard.
auth.expiredDesc: To sign in again, contact the admin and pay, then enter the renewal code you receive below.

dashboard.title: Dashboard

ordersSection.title: Orders
ordersSection.stockHint: All customer orders appear here automatically. Setting status to “Confirmed” deducts the ordered sizes from stock; “Cancelled” restores them.
ordersSection.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone or order no…
ordersSection.noResults: No orders match your search or filter.
ordersSection.waAltHint: If WhatsApp says the number doesn't exist, try this prefix

waStatus.new: We received your order and it's under review ✅
waStatus.confirmed: Your order is confirmed and being prepared 🎀
waStatus.shipped: Your order is on its way 🚚
waStatus.delivered: Your order was delivered 🎉 we hope you love it
waStatus.cancelled: We're sorry, your order was cancelled — contact us for anything 🌹
waStatus.thanks: Thank you for shopping with us 🤍

opost.title: Optimus courier
opost.subtitle: Connect your account to send orders for delivery in one click
opost.notEnabled: Optimus integration is not enabled on the platform yet. Coming soon.
opost.howto: Enter your Optimus (opost.ps) account email and password to link it to your store.
opost.privacy: 🔒 The password is used once to connect and is never stored — we only keep an encrypted access token.
opost.defaultTypeHint: Used automatically for all your shipments (e.g. Clothes).
opost.pickAreaHint: We matched the city automatically — just choose the area then send.
opost.verifyArea: Double-check the selected area before sending (we matched it approximately from the customer address).

eps.title: EPS courier
eps.subtitle: Connect your account to send orders for delivery in one click
eps.howto: Enter your EPS account email and password to link it to your store.
eps.privacy: 🔒 Credentials are stored encrypted and only used to create your EPS shipments.
eps.needOrigin: Choose the pickup city and enter the pickup address.
eps.setOriginHint: Set the pickup city and address before sending your first shipment.
eps.sendTitle: Choose the customer's city then send
eps.pickCityHint: We couldn't match the customer's city automatically — pick it manually then send.
eps.verifyCity: Double-check the selected city before sending (we matched it approximately from the customer address).

gobox.title: gobox courier
gobox.subtitle: Connect your account to send orders for delivery in one click
gobox.howto: Enter your gobox account email and password to link it to your store.
gobox.privacy: 🔒 Credentials are stored encrypted and only used to create your gobox shipments.
gobox.needOrigin: Choose the pickup village and enter the pickup address.
gobox.setOriginHint: Set the pickup village and address before sending your first shipment.
gobox.villagePh: Type a village or area name to search…
gobox.sendTitle: Choose the customer's village then send
gobox.pickVillageHint: Search for the customer's exact village (we pre-filled their city) then pick it and send.

coupons.title: Discount coupons
coupons.hint: Create discount codes (% or fixed amount) that customers apply at checkout.
coupons.empty: No coupons yet. Create your first one to attract customers!

referrals.title: Referrals
referrals.subtitle: Who brought new customers to your store — sorted by most referrals, so you can reward them.
referrals.empty: No referrals yet. Set a discount percentage in store settings so customers start sharing.

abandoned.title: Incomplete checkouts
abandoned.hint: Customers who entered their details but didn't confirm — a friendly message often saves the sale 😉

stockRequests.title: Restock requests
stockRequests.hint: Customers who left their number for sold-out items — reach out when you restock.
stockRequests.waMsg:
Hello 🌸 Good news! «{{name}}»{{variant}} you asked to be notified about is back in stock. Order it before it runs out:
{{link}}

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.hint: A quick look at your sales, orders and best-selling products.
analytics.funnelHint: Of your store visitors, how many started an order, completed it, and received it — shows where you lose customers before they buy.
analytics.abandonedHint: {{count}} abandoned cart(s) waiting — message them from the orders list to recover them.
analytics.courierMonthHint: Orders delivered this month (incl. delivery) — to reconcile the amounts each courier transfers to you.
analytics.empty: No orders yet — your stats will appear here once the first order arrives.

dashboard.visitorsHint: Visitors to your store on the platform

profileSection.title: Profile
profileSection.emailNote: To change your email, use the section below.

store.name: Store name
store.urlHint: Pick a memorable Latin handle (like your store name). The old link keeps working.
store.deliveryPhoneHint: A “Send to courier” button appears on each order, opening WhatsApp with the details ready.
store.bannersHint: You control every slide (including the first): its text and background (color/image/video), remove or add (up to 5). If you add none, a default slide with your store name is shown.
store.noBanners: No extra slides — the slider shows the fixed slide only.
store.zonesHint: Set your zones and delivery fee for each. Leave empty to use the default zones.
store.freeShippingHint: Orders above this amount get free delivery (0 = off).
store.referralHint: Discount a new customer gets when ordering via a referral link (0 = referral program off). A "Share & earn" button appears in your store when enabled.
store.loyaltyHint: Example: after every 5 orders, the 6th gets 10% off automatically — brings customers back (0 = off). Not combined with coupons or referrals.
store.flashHint: Turn on a discount across all your products for a limited time — a bold countdown shows on your store and the discount applies automatically at checkout. Perfect with paid ads: urgency lifts sales. Leave percent at zero or time empty to turn it off.
store.flashActive: Offer live ⚡ {{percent}}% off the whole store until the set time
store.flashOff: Offer is off — enter a percent and a future end time to activate it.
store.adsHint: Running Facebook/Instagram or TikTok ads for your products? Add your pixel IDs here and your store will automatically track visits, product views, add-to-carts and purchases — so you can measure your ads and reach the right customers.
store.fbPixelHint: From Facebook Ads Manager → Events Manager → pixel ID (digits).
store.tiktokPixelHint: From TikTok Ads Manager → Assets → Events → pixel ID.
store.gaIdHint: Measurement ID from GA4 settings (starts with G-).
store.sizeChartHint: Enter bust/waist/hips (cm) per size. Leave empty to use the standard chart automatically.
store.returnPolicyHint: Shown to shoppers on the product page to reassure them. Leave empty to use a default text.
store.announcementPlaceholder:
Free shipping on orders over ₪200 🎉
New collection just arrived ✨
10% off with code WELCOME
store.announcementHint: An elegant moving bar at the top of your store. Write each announcement on a separate line; they all show in sequence. Leave empty to hide.
store.announcementEnPlaceholder:
Free shipping over ₪200 🎉
New collection arrived ✨
10% off with code WELCOME
store.announcementEnHint: Shown in the bar when the language is switched to English. Leave empty to show the Arabic text in both languages.
store.welcomePlaceholder: e.g. 10% off your first order with code WELCOME10
store.welcomeHint: Shows once to a visitor on their first entry to your store. Leave empty to hide.
store.categoriesHint: Add a real photo and a name for each category (like the slider). The photo shows in the modern frameless look. Leave empty to use the default.
store.noCustomCategories: No extra categories yet. Add your own with names and photos.
store.settingsHint: Customize your store: logo, contact, slider, categories, delivery and more.
store.btnHrefHint: Put a full URL (https://...) to open an external site, or an internal path like /shop, /category/dress, or /store/store-name.

product.name: Item name
product.colorHint: Type a color and press Enter (e.g. Black)
product.variantsHint: Add each color, then choose its available sizes and the quantity of each. The customer picks a color first, then sees the available sizes.
product.qtyRequired: Enter the quantity for every selected size (required) — otherwise the color won't be saved.
product.addColorPlaceholder: Type a color name (e.g. Black) and press ＋
product.colorImagesHint: Upload the product in this color — it shows the moment the customer picks the color, and swaps the card & gallery image automatically (up to 4).
product.videoHint: Paste a direct video link (mp4). Uploading a video file needs hosting — use a link for now.
product.stockHint: Leave empty for always available, or 0 for out of stock
product.sizeStockHint: Shows customers how many of each size remain · empty = available · 0 = sold out
product.saleEndsHint: Shows a countdown to customers; when it ends the original price returns automatically.
product.colorUnknown: Color not recognized — it will be saved by name without a color dot. Try a suggested name.
product.deleteMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this product? This cannot be undone.
product.empty: No products yet. Add your first one!

product.notifyTitle: Sold out? Leave your number and we'll alert you when it's back
product.notifySent: Done! 💜 We'll alert you when it's back
product.sizeGuideIntro: Measurements are approximate, in centimeters — pick the closest to your body.
product.measureBust: Bust: measure around the fullest part.
product.measureWaist: Waist: measure around the narrowest part.
product.measureHips: Hips: measure around the fullest part.
product.sizeGuideOneSize: This item is one size, fits most.
product.findMySizeHint: Enter your measurements and we'll suggest the best size.
product.suggestEnter: Enter your bust measurement at least.
product.returnPolicyDefault: You can exchange within 3 days of delivery, provided the item stays in its original condition with the receipt. Message us on WhatsApp to arrange the exchange easily. 💜
product.viewingNow: {{count}} viewed this in the last 30 minutes
product.pickColorFirst: Choose a color first to see available sizes
product.noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first!

store.noProducts: This store has no products yet.
store.loyaltyBadge: Loyalty reward 🎁 every {{every}} orders, your next order gets {{percent}}% off

cart.title: Shopping cart
cart.reminderText: You have {{count}} item(s) in your cart — complete your order before they sell out!

co.title: Complete your order
co.name: Full name
co.notesHint: Any extra details about your order
co.doneMsg: Your order was placed successfully — the store will contact you soon to confirm it. Keep your order number to track it anytime.
co.required: Please enter your name, phone and city
co.deliveryNote: Delivery fee is an estimate, confirmed by the store

track.title: Track your order
track.hint: Enter the phone number you ordered with to see your order status.
track.notFound: No orders found for this number. Check it and try again.
track.reorderEmpty: Sorry, the items in this order are no longer available.

push.title: Order push notifications
push.desc: Enable notifications to get an instant alert on your phone for every new order.
push.onDesc: Notifications are on — you'll get an alert for every new order.
push.rowOn: On 🎉 you'll get an instant alert for every new order
push.rowOff: Turn on to get an instant alert for every new order
push.denied: Permission denied. Enable notifications for Bazara in your phone settings.
push.notConfigured: Notifications aren't set up on the server yet.

coupon.title: Discount code
coupon.maxed: This code has reached its limit.
coupon.min: Minimum order of ₪{{total}} to use this code.

checkout.title: Card payment
checkout.name: Name
checkout.redirecting: Redirecting you to the secure payment page...
checkout.success: Payment successful! Thank you for your order 🎉
checkout.failed: Payment was not completed. Please try again.

wishlist.title: Wishlist
wishlist.empty: No products in your wishlist yet.
wishlist.priceDropCount: {{count}} of your saved pieces dropped in price!
wishlist.sharedGone: These shared items are no longer available.
wishlist.sharedHint: These are the pieces picked by whoever shared this link 🌷
wishlist.shareMsg: Check out the pieces I love 🌷

subscription.title: Activate your store
subscription.subtitle: Choose a plan to publish your store online and share it with customers.
subscription.features: Full store · Public link + QR · Unlimited products · Bilingual
subscription.codeHint: After you transfer the amount per the payment instructions above, you'll receive an activation code — enter it here to activate your store instantly.
subscription.referenceHint: Enter the transfer reference or any details that help us confirm your payment.
subscription.requestSent: Request received! It will be reviewed and your subscription activated soon.
subscription.pendingDesc: We received your subscription request and will activate it after confirming payment.
subscription.expiringSoon: Your subscription expires soon! Renew now to keep your store visible.
subscription.expired: Your subscription expired. Your store is temporarily hidden, but your data and products are saved. Renew to reactivate.
subscription.pendingBanner: Your subscription request is under review.

admin.title: Subscriptions admin
admin.resetHint: If a subscriber forgets their password: they contact you, you set a new one here and send it to them.
admin.resetDone: Done! Send the new password to the subscriber.
admin.paymentHint: Describe how subscribers transfer the amount to you (wallet / bank / Payoneer). Shown on the subscribe page.
admin.codesHint: Generate codes and send them to subscribers after they transfer you the amount. Each code is single-use.
admin.newCodes: New codes (copy and send to the subscriber):
admin.siteSlidersHint: Control the public home page slider (image/video, dimmed background, continuous loop, 5s rotation) — same settings as store sliders.
admin.subscribersHint: Everyone who registered and subscribed. Send the activation code straight to their email.
admin.subSaved: Subscription saved; start and end dates updated.
admin.daysRange: Enter a number of days between 1 and 365.

order.noChannels: This store has not added a contact method yet.

qr.title: Store QR code
qr.hint: Print or share it — scanning opens your store directly.

errors.generic: Something went wrong, please try again.
